name: Crumb Coated Potato Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, lightly beat the egg.
2. Add the mashed potatoes, cheese, flour, onion, garlic salt, and pepper to the egg mixture. Stir until everything is well combined.
3. Place the bread crumbs on a piece of waxed paper.
4. With floured hands, shape one-fourth of the potato mixture into a 4 inch diameter patty.
5. Coat both sides of the patty with bread crumbs. Set aside.
6. Repeat steps 3-5 with the remaining potato mixture and bread crumbs.
7. In a large skillet over medium heat, cook the patties in margarine until they are crusty and browned on each side. If the patties are browning too quickly, reduce the heat.
8. Serve immediately or place, uncovered, in a preheated 200 degree oven to keep warm.
